name: Artrya Limited
analysis: AYA has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.6745. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$4.6745, stop A$4.3263, target A$4.7000. Risk/reward is 0.07:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
